description_long: This is a sleek ASUS laptop with a matte black finish and subtle red accents along the edges and keyboard. The lid features a brushed metal texture with the ASUS logo and a red emblem, likely representing the Republic of Gamers (ROG) series, both centrally placed. The interior reveals a full-sized keyboard with red backlighting, a large touchpad, and a screen displaying the Windows 10 operating system. The laptop is relatively thin, with visible ports on the left side, including USB, HDMI, and audio jacks. The overall design is modern and angular, with a focus on gaming aesthetics. The device appears robust yet portable, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, libraries, or co-working spaces.
description: A matte black ASUS laptop with red accents, featuring a backlit keyboard, large touchpad, and a screen displaying Windows 10. The lid displays the ASUS and ROG logos, and the device has a modern, gaming-oriented design.
description_view_0: The closed laptop lid is visible, showing a brushed black surface with the ASUS logo and a red ROG emblem centered.
description_view_1: The laptop is open from the left side, revealing the screen, keyboard, and visible side ports including USB, HDMI, and audio jacks.
description_view_2: A direct front view of the open laptop, displaying the full keyboard, large touchpad, and the screen with the Windows 10 desktop.
description_view_3: The laptop is open from the right side, showing the keyboard, screen, and the thin profile with red edge accents.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS logo is centered on the lid in silver, with a red shield-shaped ROG emblem below it.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop and application windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no visible numeric keypad, and red backlighting.
